svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="rag-full-pipeline" id="rag-pipe"> <mxGraphModel dx="-569" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="ING" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="入库链路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1010" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nO" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="运营后台
KbManagementController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="64" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nDB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="MySQL
ai_knowledge_document" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="270" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nIN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="IngestService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="476" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nSP" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="TokenTextSplitter
500 token / 50 overlap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="652" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nMD" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="注入 metadata
tenant_id/doc_id/...
tags/source" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="172" x="858" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nVS" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Elasticsearch
ai_knowledge 索引" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="476" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="nO" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nDB" value="publish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="nDB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nIN" value="DRAFT→PUBLISHED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="nIN" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nSP" value="split"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="nSP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nMD" value="chunks"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="nMD" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="nVS" value="add(chunks) 算向量写索引"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="944" y="220" /> <mxPoint x="944" y="360" /> <mxPoint x="566" y="360" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="nVS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="nDB" value="成功 / 标记 es_indexed=1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="390" y="485" /> <mxPoint x="390" y="440" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QRY" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="检索链路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="410" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nQ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="运营提一个问题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="64" y="332" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nSR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="similaritySearch
topK=5 / threshold=0.7" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="64" y="412" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nCTX" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="拼进 Prompt
相关片段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="64" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nLLM" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="租户 ChatModel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="270" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q1" edge="1" parent="1" source="nQ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="nSR" value="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q2" edge="1" parent="1" source="nSR" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nVS" value="filter: tenant_id"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3" edge="1" parent="1" source="nVS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="nCTX" value="相关片段"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="440" y="485" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="528" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q4" edge="1" parent="1" source="nCTX" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="nLLM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
